E100.name: Curcumin
E100.description: Natural orange-yellow color extracted from turmeric root.

E120.name: Carmine / Cochineal
E120.description: Red dye derived from crushed insects.

E171.name: Titanium Dioxide
E171.description: A naturally occurring mineral used as a white pigment.

E300.name: Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C)
E300.description: Generally produced from glucose, no animal involvement.

E322.name: Lecithin
E322.description: Usually sourced from soy. Halal unless derived from animal fat (rare).

E330.name: Citric Acid
E330.description: Naturally occurring weak organic acid. Mostly produced by fungal fermentation.

E422.name: Glycerol / Glycerin
E422.description: Can be derived from animal fat or plant oil. Requires investigation.

E441.name: Gelatin
E441.description: Typically sourced from pig or non-zabiha cattle. Avoid unless explicitly stated as Halal/bovine.

E471.name: Mono- and diglycerides of fatty acids
E471.description: Often derived from animal fat, but plant-based versions exist.

E621.name: Monosodium Glutamate (MSG)
E621.description: Flavor enhancer derived from fermentation. Permissible.

E904.name: Shellac
E904.description: Resin secreted by the lac bug. Some scholars permit it, others advise avoiding.
